items.title: France is 'more and more keen' on Australia critical minerals investment, minister says
items.summary: France is "more and more keen" on investing in Australian critical minerals projects, Australia's Resources Minister Madeleine King said Thursday, as countries across the world race to secure access to rare earths and other much-needed minerals. Canberra is hunting for billions in foreign investment in mining and processing projects in the hope of reaping high rewards from critical minerals exports.

items.title: Football : France and Brazil face off in a World Cup-style friendly
items.summary: In their final warm-up match before the start of the FIFA World Cup (June 11- July 19) in the United States, Mexico and Canada, France face Brazil in a friendly. Weakened by absences, the Brazilians will have their work cut out against the French, the World Cup runners-up, who comfortably topped their qualifying group. This international break could also be Kylian Mbappé’s chance to become the French national team’s all-time leading goalscorer.

items.title: Middle East war live: Israel carries out fresh wave of strikes across Iran
items.summary: Israel's military said Thursday its forces had carried out a wave of strikes across Iran, as Tehran continues to insist that it will not negotiate on a peace deal. US President Donald Trump has warned he is ready to “unleash hell” if Iran does not accept a deal to end the nearly four-week Middle East war. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Ousted Venezuelan president Maduro to appear in New York court
items.summary: Ousted Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro is set to appear in a New York court on Thursday for the second time since his dramatic capture by US forces in January. Maduro faces multiple charges including drug trafficking and weapons offences, as his lawyers challenge legal and procedural obstacles amid US sanctions.

items.title: Belarus's Lukashenko greeted by Kim Jong Un on first visit to North Korea
items.summary: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko made his first visit to North Korea on Wednesday, where he and Kim Jong Un signed a "friendship and cooperation" treaty the next day. The trip highlights growing ties between the two Moscow-aligned nations, both of which have supported Russia’s war in Ukraine, even as human rights abuses and Western sanctions continue to mount.

items.title: US ties Ukraine security guarantees to Donbas withdrawal, Zelensky says
items.summary: Ukrainian President Volodomyr Zelensky said the US is conditioning post-war security guarantees on Kyiv ceding the Russian-occupied Donbas, as Washington pushes for a swift end to the war. Zelensky warned such terms would weaken Ukraine’s defences and embolden Moscow, amid uncertainty over future US support despite continued military aid.

items.summary: Thousands of oil contracts -- a far higher volume than normal -- were traded 15 minutes before Trump pledged to halt strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure, sending prices tumbling. Traders who bet on prices dropping ahead of the announcement would likely have profited from Trump's sudden reversal, prompting analysts to question whether some market participants had acted on prior information. items.title: UN names African slave trade 'gravest crime against humanity'
items.summary: In tonight's edition, the UN General Assembly designated the transatlantic African slave trade as "the gravest crime against humanity," in a move advocates hailed as a step towards healing and possible reparations. Also, in a visit to top African trading partner Algeria, Italy's prime minister, Giorgia Meloni, said the two nations would work to increase deliveries of Algerian gas. And  the conflict in the Middle East risks crippling Kenya's flower industry.

items.title: Un hommage national à Lionel Jospin sera rendu jeudi aux Invalides
items.summary: Une cérémonie d'hommage à Lionel Jospin, ex-Premier ministre socialiste décédé le 22 mars, est organisée, jeudi aux Invalides, en présence du président Emmanuel Macron, du Premier ministre Sébastien Lecornu, des membres du gouvernement, des présidents des deux Chambres et ceux des commissions et groupes parlementaires. Les derniers hommages nationaux aux Invalides ont été rendus à Robert Badinter, et à Jacques Delors en 2024.

translation.title: A national tribute to Lionel Jospin will be given Thursday to the Invalides
translation.summary: A tribute ceremony to Lionel Jospin, former Socialist Prime Minister who died on 22 March, is organized Thursday in Les Invalides, in the presence of President Emmanuel Macron, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu, members of the government, the presidents of both Houses and those of parliamentary committees and groups. The last national tributes to the Invalides were paid to Robert Badinter and Jacques Delors in 2024.

items.title: La France et le Brésil s'affrontent dans un match amical aux airs de mondial
items.summary: Pour leur avant-dernier match avant le début de la Coupe du monde de football (11 juin-19 juillet), aux Etats-Unis, Mexique et Canada, les Français affrontent le Brésil, en match amical. Minés par les absences, les Brésiliens auront fort à faire face aux vices-champions du monde français, qui ont largement survolé leur phase qualificative. Cette trêve internationale pourrait également être l'occasion pour Kylian Mbappé de devenir le meilleur buteur de l'Equipe de France.

translation.title: France and Brazil face each other in a friendly match with the world
translation.summary: For their penultimate match before the start of the World Cup (June 11-19 July), in the United States, Mexico and Canada, the French faced Brazil in a friendly match. As a result of the absences, Brazilians will have to face the vice-champions of the French world, which have largely overflew their qualifying phase. This international truce could also be an opportunity for Kylian Mbappé to become the best scorer on the French team.

items.title: "La guerre ou la paix" : Orban brandit l’Ukraine comme épouvantail avant des élections cruciales
items.summary: À l'approche des législatives hongroises du 12 avril, Viktor Orban durcit son discours contre l'Ukraine. Fragilisé dans les sondages, le Premier ministre hongrois accuse Kiev et ses alliés européens de vouloir entraîner son pays dans le conflit, transformant le scrutin comme un choix entre la guerre ou la paix.

translation.title: "War or Peace": Orban brandishes Ukraine as a scarecrow before crucial elections
translation.summary: As the Hungarian legislatures approached on 12 April, Viktor Orban hardened his speech against Ukraine. Fragile in the polls, the Hungarian Prime Minister accuses Kiev and his European allies of wanting to drag his country into conflict, transforming the election as a choice between war or peace.

items.title: États-Unis : près de trois mois après sa capture, Nicolas Maduro revient devant la justice
items.summary: Enfermé dans une prison de Brooklyn depuis sa capture par l'armée américaine début janvier, le président vénézuélien déchu Nicolas Maduro est de retour devant la justice américaine jeudi à New York. Il ne s'est pas exprimé depuis une première audience devant le tribunal fédéral du district sud de Manhattan, le 5 janvier, au cours de laquelle lui et sa femme ont été formellement inculpés de trafic de drogue, motif officiel de leur capture.

translation.title: United States: almost three months after his capture, Nicolas Maduro returns to court
translation.summary: Locked in a Brooklyn prison since its capture by the American army in early January, the fallen Venezuelan president Nicolas Maduro is back before the American courts on Thursday in New York. He has not spoken since a first hearing in the South Manhattan District Federal Court on 5 January, during which he and his wife were formally charged with drug trafficking, an official reason for their capture.

items.title: Moyen-Orient en direct : l'armée israélienne mène des "frappes à grande échelle" en Iran
items.summary: L'armée israélienne a affirmé, jeudi, avoir mené des "frappes à grande échelle" sur plusieurs zones d'Iran, dont Ispahan, dans le centre du pays, au 27e jour la guerre au Moyen-Orient. La veille, le chef de la diplomatie iranienne a affirmé que Téhéran n'avait pas l'intention de négocier, avant que Donald Trump réaffirme que l'Iran participait bien à des tractations pour mettre fin à la guerre. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Middle East live: Israeli army leads "large-scale strikes" in Iran
translation.summary: On Thursday, the Israeli army claimed to have carried out "large-scale strikes" on several areas of Iran, including Ispahan, in the centre of the country, on the 27th day the war in the Middle East. The day before, the head of Iranian diplomacy claimed that Tehran had no intention of negotiating before Donald Trump reaffirmed Iran's participation in negotiations to end the war. Follow our direct.

items.title: Les frappes iraniennes provoquent-elles un "exode massif" d'Israéliens vers Chypre et l'Egypte ?
items.summary: Des sirènes ont retenti lundi soir dans le centre et le sud d’Israël. L’armée dit avoir détecté des tirs iraniens, qui n’auraient fait ni blessés ni dégâts majeurs. Mais sur les réseaux sociaux, plusieurs vidéos affirment que les missiles de Téhéran auraient déclenché une vague de panique en Israël : les citoyens fuiraient en masse par la route autant que par les mers. En réalité, les vidéos ne montrent pas Israël, voire sont générées par l'intelligence artificielle.

translation.title: Do the Iranian strikes cause a "mass exodus" of Israelis to Cyprus and Egypt?
translation.summary: Sirens rang Monday evening in the centre and south of Israel. The army claims to have detected Iranian fire, which did not cause injury or major damage. But on social media, several videos claim that Tehran's missiles have triggered a wave of panic in Israel: citizens would flee by road as much as by sea. In reality, the videos do not show Israel or even are generated by artificial intelligence.

items.title: Gaz : vers un partenariat d'exception entre l'Algérie et l'Italie ?
items.summary: En Algérie, cette visite de la présidente du conseil italien Georgia Méloni était à Alger ce mercredi et sans surprise dans ce contexte énergétique tendue depuis le déclenchement de la guerre contre l'Iran et les frappes sur les pays du Golf. La cheffe du gouvernement italiens ne cache pas son intérêt pour le gaz algérien. Pour en parler nous sommes avec Hasni Abidi, directeur du Centre d'Etudes et de Recherche sur le Monde Arabe et Méditerranéen.

translation.title: Gas: towards an exceptional partnership between Algeria and Italy?
translation.summary: In Algeria, this visit by the president of the Italian council Georgia Méloni was in Algiers this Wednesday and unsurprisingly in this tense energy context since the outbreak of the war against Iran and the strikes on the Gulf countries. The head of the Italian government does not hide her interest in Algerian gas. To talk about it we are with Hasni Abidi, Director of the Center for Arab and Mediterranean World Studies and Research.

items.title: Loana, icône de la téléréalité en France, est morte à 48 ans
items.summary: Loana Petrucciani, plus connue sous son seul prénom Loana, gagnante de la première saison de "Loft Story" en 2001, est morte à l'âge de 48 ans. Retrouvée sans vie mercredi à son domicile de Nice, elle avait connu une célébrité fulgurante avant de traverser des années de descente aux enfers.

translation.title: Loana, an icon of reality TV in France, died at age 48
translation.summary: Loana Petrucciani, best known under her only name Loana, winner of the first season of "Loft Story" in 2001, died at the age of 48. Returned to her home in Nice with no life on Wednesday, she had experienced a thrilling celebrity before going through years of descent to hell.

items.title: L'islamologue Tariq Ramadan condamné à 18 ans de prison pour des viols sur trois femmes
items.summary: L'islamologue suisse Tariq Ramadan a été condamné mercredi à 18 ans de réclusion criminelle, en son absence. Il était jugé par la Cour criminelle de Paris pour des viols commis sur trois femmes.

translation.title: Islamologist Tariq Ramadan sentenced to 18 years in prison for rape of three women
translation.summary: Swiss Islamologist Tariq Ramadan was sentenced on Wednesday to 18 years' imprisonment in his absence. He was tried by the Paris Criminal Court for rape of three women.

Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》

translation.title: Circular on the conduct of the Fourth National Agricultural Census issued by the State Council
translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

(b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.

items.summary: Late last week, many Telegram users in Russia began reporting serious disruptions, according to outage trackers Downdetector and Sboy.rf. Reports that Russian authorities planned to permanently block the popular messaging app in early April had been circulating for some time. But according to industry experts, the process may have begun two weeks ahead of schedule.

items.title: A longtime pro-Putin blogger published a tirade against the Russian president. Now he’s in a psychiatric hospital.
items.summary: Ilya Remeslo, a longtime pro-Kremlin blogger known for filing complaints against critics of the Russian authorities, made waves in the country this week when he published a Telegram post titled “Five reasons why I stopped supporting Vladimir Putin.” Days later, he was reported to have been hospitalized at a St. Petersburg psychiatric facility. Here’s what we know about Remeslo’s about-face.

items.title: Telegram news channels are one of Russia’s few major alternatives to state media. The head of one of the largest says their days may be numbered.
items.summary: Last weekend, by all appearances, the Russian authorities began blocking the messaging app Telegram across the country. The restrictions promise to deal a heavy blow to what remains of Russia’s media landscape, including Ostorozhno, Novosti, one of the platform’s largest news channels. Launched in 2021 as part of socialite Ksenia Sobchak’s media holding Ostorozhno Media, the outlet continues to operate inside Russia while covering topics that almost every other censored publication avoids.

items.title: Ukraine’s counteroffensive brings gains in the south but weakens other sectors of the front. Meduza analyzes the latest battlefield developments.
items.summary: Like our earlier reports on the combat situation in Ukraine, this article reviews recent battlefield developments based on open-source information. Meduza has condemned Russia’s invasion of Ukraine from the outset, and our military analyses reflect our commitment to objective reporting on a war we firmly oppose.
